name: Ragdoll Drop
author: Poki
description: Ragdoll Drop is a physics game where chaos is the goal! Toss your wobbly character into pits, smash them into walls, spin them on wild rides, or blast them off on rockets—anything goes! Try out crazy vehicles like shopping carts and catapults, complete quests, unlock secret skins, and discover endless goofy ways to break your ragdoll. With simple controls, silly humor, and unpredictable fun, Ragdoll Drop is pure, bouncy mayhem! Ready to drop into the madness? How to play Ragdoll Drop? Click or tap to play! Who created Ragdoll Drop? Ragdoll Drop is created by Ericetto. Play their other games on Poki: Ragdoll Hit ! How can I play Ragdoll Drop for free? You can play Ragdoll Drop for free on Poki. Can I play Ragdoll Drop on mobile devices and desktop? Ragdoll Drop can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
